title: Consistent Dispense Sounds
description: Makes dispenser and dropper sounds consistent with the crafter sounds!
body:
# Consistent Dispense Sounds
This resource pack makes dispenser and dropper sounds consistent with the crafter sounds. The following sounds have been changed to make this consistency:
- **Dispenser dispense sound** is now the **Crafter dispense sound**
- **Dispenser failed dispense sound** is now the **Crafter failed dispense sound**
- **Dropper dispense sound** is now the **Crafter dispense sound**
- **Dropper failed dispense sound** is now the **Crafter failed dispense sound**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/e4-At1bz0OU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Here are the new sounds for the dispenser and dropper:
- [Dispense sound](https://minecraft.wiki/images/transcoded/Crafter_craft.ogg/Crafter_craft.ogg.mp3)
- [Dispense fail sound](https://minecraft.wiki/images/transcoded/Crafter_fail.ogg/Crafter_fail.ogg.mp3)
#
Unlike other resource packs, this pack **does not** change other sounds such as the button, pressure plate, or menu sounds as a side effect, which is very good!

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/consistent-dispense-sounds/)
